evals.prompt: /sealos-s3 create private object storage for this repo and wire S3 env vars
evals.expected_output: Analyzes the project, checks sealos-cli auth/workspace, lists existing buckets, creates or reuses a private bucket, fetches S3 credentials without printing secrets, writes only the local S3 env keys the app reads, and verifies the storage path.

assertions.name: uses-analyzer
assertions.description: Runs scripts/analyze-project-s3.mjs or performs equivalent file-backed detection before choosing env keys

assertions.name: uses-sealos-cli-s3
assertions.description: Uses sealos-cli s3 commands from PR #28 instead of raw kubectl objectstorage CRDs

assertions.name: protects-secrets
assertions.description: Does not print access keys, secret keys, or full credential blocks in the final answer

evals.prompt: /sealos-s3 replace my local MinIO bucket with Sealos object storage for development
evals.expected_output: Detects MinIO/S3 env usage, keeps Docker Compose rollback intact unless asked otherwise, creates or reuses a private Sealos bucket, maps Sealos credentials into the existing MinIO/S3-compatible env keys, and verifies upload/download behavior.

assertions.name: preserves-rollback
assertions.description: Does not remove or rewrite the local MinIO service unless the user explicitly asks

assertions.name: maps-existing-keys
assertions.description: Uses existing MINIO_* or S3_* keys read by the app rather than inventing unused aliases

evals.expected_output: Explains bucket policy choices, asks before changing a bucket to publicRead or publicReadwrite, and suggests presigned URLs when temporary sharing is enough.

assertions.name: asks-before-public
assertions.description: Does not run update-bucket --policy publicRead/publicReadwrite without user confirmation

assertions.name: mentions-presign
assertions.description: Recommends sealos-cli s3 presign for temporary sharing when appropriate

evals.expected_output: Warns that rotation affects active clients, asks for confirmation, runs rotate-secret only after confirmation, polls secret until the new version is ready, updates dependent local env values without exposing them, and verifies the app can still access storage.

assertions.name: rotation-is-confirmed
assertions.description: Treats rotate-secret as sensitive and asks before rotating credentials for an active app

assertions.name: handles-async-status
assertions.description: Recognizes rotate-secret returns status updating and polls s3 secret before updating apps
